description: Auto-responses for simple/straightforward partner replies. Matched by campaign. No LLM cost.
simple_reply_patterns: ^\s*(yes|yeah|yea|yep|yup|ya|sure|ok|okay|k|bet|lets go|let's go|start|ready|i'm ready|im ready|do it|sign me up|how|how do i|what do i do|send them|send it|interested|i'm interested|im interested|absolutely|for sure|down|i'm down|im down|please|yes please|ok thanks|okay thanks|START)\s*[!.?👍🙏💪]*\s*$

_default.response: Open the Shiftsmart app and look for the "In-app orientations" section on the home screen. Tap "Complete learning module" next to Circle K - Food Prep - Breakfast. It takes about 30 minutes and your progress is saved so you can start now and finish later. Once you finish and complete your first shift, you'll get a $10 bonus.

4.6.26 - OP_no_BGC_Pilot.response: To pick up Circle K shifts, go to the Shifts tab in the Shiftsmart app and find a shift that works for your schedule. When you find one you like, tap the "Book Shift" button to sign up for it! Let me know if you have any questions.
